MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS GARY VOLLEN AND STANFORD GROUP COMPANY'S Motion To Stay.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION TO STAY GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT STANFORD GROUP COMPANY AND DEFENDANT VOLLEN. In addition, the Court indicated that if circumstances change and if appropriate, any party may bring request to have stay lifted. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.)
